inputs.label: Initial Investment (PV)
inputs.businessContext: The amount of money you start with.

businessContext_i18n.en: The amount of money you start with.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Geldbetrag, mit dem Sie beginnen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le montant d'argent avec lequel vous commencez.
businessContext_i18n.es: La cantidad de dinero con la que comienza.
La tasa de interés nominal anual.

inputs.label: Number of Years
inputs.businessContext: The total number of years the money is invested for.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total number of years the money is invested for.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Gesamtzahl der Jahre, in denen das Geld angelegt ist.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le nombre total d'années pendant lesquelles l'argent est investi.
businessContext_i18n.es: El número total de años que el dinero está invertido.

inputs.label: Compounding Frequency
inputs.businessContext: How often interest is compounded per year (e.g., 1 for annual, 12 for monthly).

businessContext_i18n.en: How often interest is compounded per year (e.g., 1 for annual, 12 for monthly).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Faizin yılda kaç kez bileşiklendiği (örneğin, yıllık için 1, aylık için 12).
businessContext_i18n.de: Häufigkeit der Zinsgutschrift pro Jahr (z. B. 1 für jährlich, 12 für monatlich).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Fréquence de capitalisation par an (par exemple, 1 pour annuelle, 12 pour mensuelle).
businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia de capitalización por año (p. ej., 1 para anual, 12 para mensual).

inputs.label: Periodic Payment (PMT)
inputs.businessContext: The amount added to the investment at each compounding period. Positive for contributions.

businessContext_i18n.en: The amount added to the investment at each compounding period. Positive for contributions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her bileşik döneminde yatırıma eklenen miktar. Katkılar için pozitif.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Betrag, der bei jeder Zinsperiode zur Anlage hinzugefügt wird. Positiv für Einzahlungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le montant ajouté à l'investissement à chaque période de capitalisation. Positif pour les apports.
businessContext_i18n.es: La cantidad añadida a la inversión en cada período de capitalización. Positivo para contribuciones.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
